name: agent-marketplace-pages
description: Reusable GitHub Action for generating and deploying a static agent marketplace browser site to GitHub Pages

scripts.dev: MARKETPLACE_DIST_DIR=default-ui/public/data MARKETPLACE_REPO=test/awesome-copilot MARKETPLACE_REMOTES_FILE=remotes.local.json node generator/generate-from-repo.mjs && npm run --prefix default-ui dev
scripts.preview: MARKETPLACE_DIST_DIR=default-ui/public/data MARKETPLACE_REPO=test/awesome-copilot MARKETPLACE_REMOTES_FILE=remotes.local.json node generator/generate-from-repo.mjs && npm run --prefix default-ui build && npm run --prefix default-ui preview
scripts.fixtures:regen: MARKETPLACE_PLUGIN_ROOT=fixtures/plugins MARKETPLACE_OUTPUT=fixtures/marketplace.json MARKETPLACE_CLAUDE_OUTPUT= MARKETPLACE_NAME=fixture-marketplace MARKETPLACE_DESCRIPTION='Local development fixture for testing the marketplace UI' node generator/generate-marketplace.mjs
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run --prefix default-ui build

author: passelin
